message:
fix(misc): config validation display, clippy lint suppression, const restore

src/main.rs:
- Move Config::load() call from before the config path display to
  after it, and wrap in a match to print validation status: "Current
  configuration is valid." on success or "Configuration Error: {e}"
  on failure. Previously the load result was silently discarded with
  let _ = Config::load(), hiding parse errors from the user.

src/autocomplete.rs:
- Restore const on FileCache::new() now that the struct fields
  support const initialization

src/compaction.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to prepare_compaction() to
  suppress the lint after the early-exit guard addition pushed the
  function over the threshold

src/interactive/share.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::items_after_test_module)] to the tests module
  to suppress the lint triggered by impl PiApp methods following
  the #[cfg(test)] mod tests block

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -747,6 +747,7 @@ async fn generate_turn_prefix_summary(
 // Public API
 // =============================================================================
 
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
 pub fn prepare_compaction(
     path_entries: &[SessionEntry],
     settings: ResolvedCompactionSettings,
